title: Supply Chain Manager - Meesho Logistics - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Meesho Logistics - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Meesho Logistics! We are hiring a Supply Chain Manager for our Indore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Meesho Logistics:
Meesho Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Meesho Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
